title: wenzelia brevipes
intro: Wenzelia brevipes, also known as the Philippine sand Verbena, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Wenzelia brevipes include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Wenzelia brevipes is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in traditional medicine preparations such as tinctures and ointments.
